targets_used.name: Stocking_Priority_Class
targets_used.description: Engineered business priority class used by the stocking-priority classifier.

targets_used.name: Daily_Units_Sold
targets_used.description: Observed daily demand used by the sales prediction model.

summary_cards.label: Columns
summary_cards.note: Available product, store, demand, and supply features.

summary_cards.label: Deployed Models
summary_cards.note: Hybrid priority classifier and sales regressor.

feature_groups.name: Product and category metadata
feature_groups.description: Category, sub-category, product, brand, brand tier, festival, and store descriptors.

feature_groups.name: Pricing and promotion
feature_groups.description: Current price, base price, discount, competitor price, promotion type, and marketing support.

feature_groups.name: Shelf and supply-chain signals
feature_groups.description: Shelf capacity, shelf life, lead time, fill rate, delay, stock on hand, and safety stock context.

feature_groups.name: Demand and engagement signals
feature_groups.description: Daily units sold, digital traffic, loyalty behavior, basket size, and trend proxies.

text_template_design.template: Category: ... | Product: ... | SubCategory: ... | Brand: ... | BrandTier: ... | Promotion: ... | Festival: ... | StoreType: ...
text_template_design.why_it_exists: The template lets a linear model pick up product semantics and business context without a heavy transformer dependency.

engineered_features_created.name: Profit_Density
engineered_features_created.purpose: Captures profit return per shelf unit.

engineered_features_created.name: Stocking_Priority_Score
engineered_features_created.formula: Weighted score using profit density, shelf life, fill rate, supplier delay, and backorder risk.
engineered_features_created.purpose: Creates the priority target used for classification experiments.

leakage_checks: The classification model does not use Daily_Units_Sold, Gross_Profit, Profit_Density, Unit_Margin, or Stocking_Priority_Score as input features.
The sales model predicts Daily_Units_Sold without using post-outcome columns such as Online_Sales_Units or In_Store_Sales_Units.
Recommendation outputs are computed after prediction, not fed back into model inference.

models_used.inputs: Numeric retail and supply-chain features only.
models_used.strengths: Fast, interpretable, easy to explain in an academic demo.
models_used.limitations: Misses product semantics captured by the text template.

models_used.inputs: Column-aware text template plus numeric retail features.
models_used.outputs: Low / Medium / High priority with class probabilities.
models_used.strengths: Balances interpretability with better semantic coverage.
models_used.limitations: Linear decision boundary; still depends on engineered target design.

models_used.purpose: Predicts daily units sold for `/predict/sales` and downstream recommendations.
models_used.inputs: Same text template plus numeric business features.
models_used.limitations: Designed as a robust baseline rather than a complex temporal forecaster.

models_used.purpose: Future non-linear benchmark for richer interaction learning.
models_used.inputs: Structured features and learned text embeddings.
models_used.strengths: Could model non-linear effects across promotion, demand, and risk signals.
models_used.limitations: Not packaged into this offline demo build; would need formal tuning and stronger controls.

models_used.purpose: Text-only semantic baseline for product descriptions and business context.
models_used.outputs: Text-driven class probabilities or semantic labels.
models_used.strengths: Strong transfer learning potential on language-heavy tasks.
models_used.limitations: Text-only view misses numeric operational constraints and is not bundled for offline demo use.

tuning_summary.formal_tuning_status: A limited offline experiment sweep was run to compare baseline and tuned variants. The demo UI itself does not retrain models live.

classification.note: Hybrid text + numeric modeling clearly outperformed the numeric-only baseline. A small C sweep was tried offline to validate stability.

regression.note: A small Ridge alpha sweep was tried offline. The UI only compares precomputed results.
